hints.text: Autonomous region of Portugal → Portuguese infra; mostly **open agricultural fields on rolling hills** (Madeira = steep mountains, few fields)
**Dry stone walls of black volcanic rock** very common (absent on Madeira; mainland walls aren't volcanic)
**Hydrangeas** + **Japanese cedars** (cryptomeria) common — cedars aren't native anywhere in mainland Europe
Houses 1–2 storeys, orange tile roofs, white/pastel w/ **dark-green shutters**; **grey highlights** almost exclusive to the Azores
Street signs = **painted ceramic tiles**, blue letters w/ a decorative border
Only **São Miguel, Terceira & Faial** have car coverage; São Miguel = only Gen4 + only island w/ lakes; **black-and-white cows** (Madeira's are brown/white)
